summary: Suppress false pagination_signal_missing warnings when BGG's declared XML-envelope total is already satisfied.
reason: BGG's XML-normalized page envelopes declare a total item count via @total or @count. For valid single-page results where the first page satisfies that total, paginatedGet stopped correctly but still emitted a pagination_signal_missing truncation event because no next-cursor or has-more fields are declared; MCP and agent consumers can treat that structured stderr event as incomplete data even though stdout is complete.
validated_outcome: Single-page BGG responses with @total/@count no longer emit pagination_signal_missing; responses without any usable pagination signal still warn; go test -count=1 ./internal/cli/ passes.
